'''âr-f-m''' ('''rafama''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:zigzag|zigzag]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-f-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zigzag|zigzag]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âr-f-m
|-
! Lemma
| rafama
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:rafamithi|rafamithi]] || [[word:rafamiji|rafamiji]] || [[word:rafamishi|rafamishi]] || [[word:rafami|rafami]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:rafamuthuth|rafamuthuth]] || [[word:rafamujuj|rafamujuj]] || [[word:rafamushush|rafamushush]] || [[word:rafam|rafam]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:rafamuthu|rafamuthu]] || [[word:rafamuju|rafamuju]] || [[word:rafamushu|rafamushu]] || [[word:rafamu|rafamu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:rafamufuth|rafamufuth]] || [[word:rafamufuj|rafamufuj]] || [[word:rafamufush|rafamufush]] || [[word:rafamuf|rafamuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:rafamethe|rafamethe]] || [[word:rafameje|rafameje]] || [[word:rafameshe|rafameshe]] || [[word:rafame|rafame]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:rafamothoth|rafamothoth]] || [[word:rafamojoj|rafamojoj]] || [[word:rafamoshosh|rafamoshosh]] || [[word:rafam|rafam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:rafamotho|rafamotho]] || [[word:rafamojo|rafamojo]] || [[word:rafamosho|rafamosho]] || [[word:rafamo|rafamo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:rafamofoth|rafamofoth]] || [[word:rafamofoj|rafamofoj]] || [[word:rafamofosh|rafamofosh]] || [[word:rafamof|rafamof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:rafamĂŻf|rafamĂŻf]] || [[word:rafamĂŻf|rafamĂŻf]] || [[word:rafamĂŻf|rafamĂŻf]] || [[word:rafamĂŻf|rafamĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:rafamĂŻfĂŻf|rafamĂŻfĂŻf]] || [[word:rafamĂŻfĂŻf|rafamĂŻfĂŻf]] || [[word:rafamĂŻfĂŻf|rafamĂŻfĂŻf]] || [[word:rafamĂŻfĂŻf|rafamĂŻfĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:rafamĂŻf|rafamĂŻf]] || [[word:rafamĂŻf|rafamĂŻf]] || [[word:rafamĂŻf|rafamĂŻf]] || [[word:rafamĂŻf|rafamĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:rafamĂŻf|rafamĂŻf]] || [[word:rafamĂŻf|rafamĂŻf]] || [[word:rafamĂŻf|rafamĂŻf]] || [[word:rafamĂŻf|rafamĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:rafamĂŠthĂŠ|rafamĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:rafamĂŠjĂŠ|rafamĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:rafamĂŠshĂŠ|rafamĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:rafamĂŠ|rafamĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:rafamathath|rafamathath]] || [[word:rafamajaj|rafamajaj]] || [[word:rafamashash|rafamashash]] || [[word:rafam|rafam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:rafamatha|rafamatha]] || [[word:rafamaja|rafamaja]] || [[word:rafamasha|rafamasha]] || [[word:rafama|rafama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:rafamafath|rafamafath]] || [[word:rafamafaj|rafamafaj]] || [[word:rafamafash|rafamafash]] || [[word:rafamaf|rafamaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:rafamasha|rafamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gorafamasha|gorafamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokirafamasha|gokirafamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:rafamnĂŒsha|rafamnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gorafamnknĂŒsha|gorafamnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokirafamnĂŒsha|gokirafamnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:rafamshĂ«sha|rafamshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorafamnkshĂ«sha|gorafamnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokirafamshĂ«sha|gokirafamshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:rafamrosha|rafamrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorafamnkrosha|gorafamnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokirafamrosha|gokirafamrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:rafammusha|rafammusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gorafamnkmusha|gorafamnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirafammusha|gokirafammusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:rafamsherasha|rafamsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gorafamnksherasha|gorafamnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokirafamsherasha|gokirafamsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:rafamngasha|rafamngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gorafamnkngasha|gorafamnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokirafamngasha|gokirafamngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:rafamyasha|rafamyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gorafamnkyasha|gorafamnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokirafamyasha|gokirafamyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:rafamyamasha|rafamyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gorafamnkyamasha|gorafamnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokirafamyamasha|gokirafamyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:rafamnĂŒshĂ«sha|rafamnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gorafamnknĂŒshĂ«sha|gorafamnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokirafamnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokirafamnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:rafamnĂŒrosha|rafamnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorafamnknĂŒrosha|gorafamnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokirafamnĂŒrosha|gokirafamnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rafamnĂŒmusha|rafamnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorafamnknĂŒmusha|gorafamnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirafamnĂŒmusha|gokirafamnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:rafamshĂ«nĂŒsha|rafamshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gorafamnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gorafamnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokirafamshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokirafamshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:rafamshĂ«rosha|rafamshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorafamnkshĂ«rosha|gorafamnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokirafamshĂ«rosha|gokirafamshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rafamshĂ«musha|rafamshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorafamnkshĂ«musha|gorafamnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirafamshĂ«musha|gokirafamshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:rafamronĂŒsha|rafamronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gorafamnkronĂŒsha|gorafamnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokirafamronĂŒsha|gokirafamronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:rafamroshĂ«sha|rafamroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gorafamnkroshĂ«sha|gorafamnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokirafamroshĂ«sha|gokirafamroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rafamromusha|rafamromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorafamnkromusha|gorafamnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirafamromusha|gokirafamromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:rafammunĂŒsha|rafammunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gorafamnkmunĂŒsha|gorafamnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokirafammunĂŒsha|gokirafammunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:rafammushĂ«sha|rafammushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gorafamnkmushĂ«sha|gorafamnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokirafammushĂ«sha|gokirafammushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:rafammurosha|rafammurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorafamnkmurosha|gorafamnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokirafammurosha|gokirafammurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:rafam|rafam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:rĂŠfĂŠm|rĂŠfĂŠm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:horafam|horafam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:horĂŠfĂŠm|horĂŠfĂŠm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohorafam|hohorafam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohorĂŠfĂŠm|hohorĂŠfĂŠm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒrafam|nĂŒrafam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒrĂŠfĂŠm|nĂŒrĂŠfĂŠm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒrafam|nĂŒnĂŒrafam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒrĂŠfĂŠm|nĂŒnĂŒrĂŠfĂŠm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻrafam|nĂŻrafam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻrĂŠfĂŠm|nĂŻrĂŠfĂŠm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻrafam|nĂŻnĂŻrafam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻrĂŠfĂŠm|nĂŻnĂŻrĂŠfĂŠm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lurafam|lurafam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lurĂŠfĂŠm|lurĂŠfĂŠm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulurafam|lulurafam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulurĂŠfĂŠm|lulurĂŠfĂŠm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lirafam|lirafam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lirĂŠfĂŠm|lirĂŠfĂŠm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilirafam|lilirafam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilirĂŠfĂŠm|lilirĂŠfĂŠm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:korafam|korafam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:korĂŠfĂŠm|korĂŠfĂŠm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokorafam|kokorafam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokorĂŠfĂŠm|kokorĂŠfĂŠm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kerafam|kerafam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kerĂŠfĂŠm|kerĂŠfĂŠm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekerafam|kekerafam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekerĂŠfĂŠm|kekerĂŠfĂŠm]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|17228b0}}
